reviews.review_text:
My husband and I, stayed in Deluxe Double Cabin 87 for 7 nights last month. Unfortunately I didnt find anything Deluxe. Bedrooms were tiny. The main bedroom, there was no room to walk down the side of the bed near the window and at the end of the bed, it nearly touched the wardrobe. The other bedroom (which we didnt use) with the double bed bunk, was against the wall, so if you had 2 people sleeping in that, they would have to climb over each other. It is advertised as 4-5 guests.
The floor lino in the lounge/kitchen is ripped and looks ugly.
Couch cushions worn and torn on the edge facing out and also looked ugly as you could see the foam inside.
Oven and stove top knobs numbers were worn off so you could not see what temperature it was on.
It seems to be only good for  2 people for 1-2 nights, as 1 towel for a 1 person for 7 nights is not good. And only 1 facewasher to share ??? We asked to use the other towels in the guest room (giving us 2 towels each) and firstly told No, but then changed mind to Yes.
The cabin is set out for a couple nights only, not for a holiday for 7 nights.
The dishcloth and the scourer were half size. Try washing dishes for 7 days and nights with them.
I realise I could have asked for more if needed, but I booked for 7 nights and would think that management would realise what is needed for 7 nights.
The park itself was great, tidy, clean and good position.
Great caravan park.

Nice park right on the river. Clean and tidy, although a little dated with some repairs or renovations needed. Driveways and caravan sites are concreted. Park sits right beside the highway, pub and general store. River walk and raill trail start at the bottom of the property.
So helpful , beautifully clean ,riveside site so peaceful
Great place for camping, and fishing.

Like everyone says This is an excellent place to stay. Close to Bairnsdale for shopping. Has a pub and Nico's right next door for some top food experience's. There's also a post office and local produce. We took full advantage of the rail trail for our daily walks The staff are fantastic and keep the park beautifully clean. Great roomy amenities .(Thankyou Geordie and everyone we met)

Had a recent stay here and all was great!
Spacious slab caravan sites, super clean amenities and very friendly staff!
Pub next door has great meals
Looked quite busy but was still nice and quiet

We had a river front caravan site for 3 nights; views are very nice and the fully equipped gazebo was very useful.  Park Manager Jordy and his staff could not have been more helpful assisting me and our group with logistics and trailers.
Great location. Staff were amazing, so friendly and helpful. So relaxing, will definitely book again 🥰

We stayed in a studio apartment because we bought our boat down , the apartment was excellent , Jordie was very accomodating with the boat there is even a berth on the river if you want to leave the boat in , 2 min walk to the general store and pub and the boat ramp at Nicholson was great , highly recommend the caravan park

We spent a week at this beautiful park and were amazed at the how well maintained the park is. It makes you feel special just driving in. Jordy the manager and his staff could not have been more helpful and friendly. We would highly recommend the park for all age groups especially families. We stayed in the studio apartment and it was like stepping into a 5 star hotel each afternoon!! The amenities the beautiful large pool the rotunda with free bar b facilities just made it a special holiday. You are in the in the heart of East Gippsland and close to Lakes Entrance and the ninety mile beach making it the perfect destination for a holiday. It doesn’t get better than this!
Amazing camping !

We are having a stop over before heading back home! We are staying in a cabin, it’s absolutely beautiful caravan park and the room is spotless, clean and is very well designed!

I would highly recommend staying here. The owners are very helpful and friendly too!

Only a 10 min drive to Bairnsdale for a great selection of shops and restaurants.
Great catch up with cussie,s.

We stopped by for a night on our way back to Melbourne, as we have planned to stop here before and see the river. The service was excellent from the team and you can purchase wood to have a fire.  Book ahead to secure a river front for great views. There is a little road noise but that does die down at the evening.  There are bream in the river to catch and you can walk to the pier or pub very close by. Overall found the place very clean nice pool and great views of the river.

If I could rate this place higher I definitely would because the staff went above and beyond to make you feel welcome and your stay enjoyable! Special shout out to Geordy who was an absolute legend and showed us down to our cracker of a camp site. Amenities are super clean, mop provided to be able to clean up after a shower as well which we always love. Really neat and obviously well cared for park. Highly recommend - one of the best parks we have stayed in among our travels!
Location wise it’s super close to an amazing cafe and pub + short drive to so many day trip spots. Great spot to base at for a while.
Thank you to the team at Nicholson - it’s clear to see how much pride is taken in the park and interaction with guests.
Management was very friendly and service was great

Clean amenities.Concrete slab for caravan, grass sites near the river but still great sites. Once your'e in the park you wouldn't know the highway goes past the front gate. Assesable fishing, lovely spot even if your'e not catching. Pub has tastiest palma I've had.
Overall s great frindly place
Perfect spot right on the river. Lovely and helpful host, very clean amenities. Camp site was perfect. so close to hotel and cafe. We will definitely be back.
Using an unpowered site for Ford RV. Very good facilities. Close to road, but OK. Next to hotel for meals with limited access for dogs, not used. Friendly service.
We really enjoyed our stay and Jordy the Park Manager was amazing. So friendly and helpful and provided a fantastic experience! Close to cafe and local pub and well maintained park. We will be back !
NRHP has everything you need. BBQs, community kitchen, river front sites. Walk to pub, bottle shop, cafe/general store and only ten minutes from Bairnsdale.

Nice spot, on the river, heaps of fish about. Friendly workers. Nice new cabins
Only issue is if youre right on the river theres nowhere for grey water to go, so youve got to run it to the dump point. But its definitely worth a visit and stay

Great spot just opposite the beach
Really quiet when we were there in March

Just an overnight stay with our caravan but loved it. Beautiful location by the river, hotel and Cafe close by.
Amenities beautifully clean and park is lovely to stroll around and enjoy the location.
Gordon and Cheryl what lovely people and made us feel right at home.
Even though it's on the main road it was super quite.
We will be back for sure.

Went to spend a night with friends staying at park. Staff were fantastic. Park has all accommodation.  We stayed in their new motel style cabins.  Just beautiful.  Dinner at pub which was 2 minutes walk.  Coffee and toastie at nicho store which is basically part of the park.  Perfect place for a great weekend away on the river.

After leaving NRMA park with the rudest person we’ve ever encountered on the road, we arrived here.  What a beautiful park, first class service by Jordy and finally we can relax after our drive.  Highly recommend this park and cabins

Absolutely love this caravan park.
Dogs friendly, clean toilets and showers. Friendly staff and looks after place. We definitely going to come back. Highly recommended

Great park extremely clean and tidy close to the water and lovely views great place for a holiday
The staff Cheryl & Gordy. Are extremely friendly
And we felt very welcome. Thanks guys for a great few days.had breky at the store and it was very nice

This is a fantastic little caravan park which is quiet, on the river, spotlessly clean with well manicured gardens. The highlight is Jordy the manager who will make sure you have everything you need and is super friendly. We walked to the pub next door for a drink and there’s a cafe out the front that opens at 0600 highly recommended.

A Lovely Stay at Nicholson 🌿✨

From the moment we arrived, we felt welcomed by the friendly and efficient receptionist who quickly got us set up with the perfect camping spot—close to the amenities and laundry, which was super convenient for us.

The value for money here was great, especially for doing laundry, and everyone we met was incredibly friendly. The amenities, kitchen, and laundry were spotless and well-maintained. We even cooked dinner in the camp kitchen, which had all the cooking tools we needed—super handy!

The café was a delightful bonus. The coffee was great, and the pie? Absolutely scrumptious!

We really enjoyed our stay at Nicholson—clean, cozy, and full of friendly vibes. Would definitely recommend it for anyone passing through. 🚐☕🥧

This place is wonderful. Amenities are amazingly good, huge showers and toilet cubicles. They also play a radio stn in toilets which is a good thing!! Lovely staff.  The park is as clean as a whistle . Right next door to a terrific Cafe and general store, and not far from Metung. The river at the end of the park is lovely. I think this park was the very best we stayed at in the 6 weeks we were travelling. Would highly recommend.  Thanks heaps guys. X0X0 Oh and it is dog friendly.!!!
Went to  a birthday party .good for some, not for me.

A great location for a family or bunch of mates. Ideally located near the boat ramp with easy access to the pub and general store which also has a cafe. Rooms were clean and tidy. Camping along the river is my preference though.

Awoken at 7am this morning by plumbers parking next to me and chatting, car doors and excavators. They proceeded to dig a trench at my back door and remove my water tap, lay new pipes in my site and the 3 empty ones next to me. Was given no warning when I checked in yesterday, there were sites available at the other end of the park I could’ve been given instead. I’d love to have asked for a refund, but I left on 3 hours of sleep just to get away from the madness. You lost a multiple weeks booking because you didn’t give a rip about your customers, I was planning to return after provisioning.

Prices far to high for unpowered sites. Your getting charged close to a weekly house rental price for a tent site or car/ van space.
$290 to $343 a week for a powered tent or car space is way to expensive.

Probably why these parks are struggling as the majority of grey nomads go "free camping"

We moored on the river1 overnight
It was easy to get a mooring, very close to the pub and for the morning - to the coffee shop where we had a nice breakfast
Toilets were clean as were the BBQs
Very nice staff.

We stayed on a caravan slab site over Easter. The park was very clean and tidy with great amenities. The manager, Jordie, greeted us and guided us onto the site. A pet friendly park that is safe for dogs. Set beside the Nicholson river, it is ideal for kayaks and being near the boat ramp, there’s easy access for boats. The park is right beside the redeveloped general store and café that serves good coffee and great pies, served by friendly staff. The pub is next door and has good meals. All in all, we felt very welcome and valued by the park people. Highly recommended.

A lovely clean and tidy park in a quiet location on the Nicholsen River. Convenient as there is a great cafe and hotel next door.  Only 25mins from Lakes Entrance.  I highly recommend as the park manager/owner made us feel welcome  and the cafe staff were the same. Grass and concrete sites, very clean and fresh amenities.
Have stayed in many over the years and was one of the best in our opinion.

We have two tents so we picked river side power sites. The river is beautiful especially dawn and evening.

Location is great, only 15 mins drive to Lake Entrance and it is next to a bottle shop and cafe.

Amenities are clean and new, bathroom is very nice. Hot water pressure is strong and stable. Camp Kitchen is fuly equiped with what we need and utensils are clean.
Very nice area. Great views of river. Nice trail walks. Geordie was very helpful and pleasant. Site was very clean. 👍
Lovely location manager Geordie is so welcoming friendly and remarkable caretaker. Park is maintained impeccably. Would recommend to everyone.

Beautiful scenic view from the river..
Clean and friendly staff, highly recommended
What a great place! My wife and a few friends camp here every year and are always made to feel welcome.  The managers are so helpful, and it is one of those spots we love to go back to!
The park manager Geordie makes sure that everyone feels at home. Very friendly. Great amenities and just an all round great feel! We will definitely be back!

Beautiful location on the Nicholson River. Very clean and maintained well. Jordy was very helpful in spotting as I parked up Winne. I stayed on 2 separate occasions, enjoyed both stays. There is a General store right next door, bottle shop and pub.

I would have given this a 5 star but at $50 per night I feel it's a little too expensive by comparison to other places I stayed at who charged $40 per night, concrete slab, powered site with ensuit.

Beautiful park right by the river with lovely views.  The manager, Geordie, couldn't have been more helpful and went out of his way for us. Pub and lovely cafe/general store right next door to park. Very clean and spacious showers and toilets. Short distance to Bairnsdale, Metung and Lakes Entrance. Will be back ASAP.
This park is absolutely beautiful 😍
Stayed on a powered  caravan site , extremely friendly owner/manager. Very happy to help . Nice and clean amenities would definately come back again.

Such a beautiful quiet
Relaxing time
It's definitely a must
Even when busy, still relaxing

I loved being able to camp right on the river. Amenities currently undergoing renovations. Nice pub next door along with a cafe/bakery with lovely food and good coffee. Manager of the park was very helpful and friendly and looks out for all his guests.
Great park very clean and tidy. Handy to the nicho shop and the pub which made it very convenient to grab something to eat or have dinner and a beer

Great place to stay especially with it being right next to the pub and the general store. Very tidy park and the staff were friendly and approachable and also a wealth of local knowledge with things to do and places to see

I guess with any business there is a reason for not answering your phone or web directed queries??

I rang this business, they did not answer.
I put a web request through from their website, no answer.
I called again and left a message, no answer.

The park itself might be fantastic, I will never know!
